description: RSS/Atom shape where only a short summary is available (no full body). Tests that the model produces a complete article (headline/lead/body/SEO) even from minimal input.
rawArticleText: Leibnitz. Das Weinkultur-Festival in Gamlitz lockt am Wochenende erneut tausende Besucher. Eröffnung Freitag um 18 Uhr am Hauptplatz.
notes: Minimal-input fixture: Atom <summary>-only feeds typically deliver 100-200 chars. Validates that the merged prompt does not hallucinate facts to pad the body. Gamlitz is a Leibnitz gemeindeSynonym.
